City Dog Park (inside Lincoln Drive Park)

The apple tree is at the end of the City Dog Park (inside Lincoln Drive Park). Doesn’t overlap the fence, so there’s minimal risk of dog waste contamination. Access: Public.

Independence Park (a small area off Demers Ave near the Smiley Water Tower)

Oak leaves are available throughout summer and mid-fall. Many oaks are toward the river near Lincoln Drive Park and along the Greenway (location on map is approximate). Leaves aside, you can always eat the acorns raw or cooked.
